svg.title: Estimating the hidden music under the Nostromo beep
svg.desc: A three-step waveform diagram showing a movie waveform with music, beep and music, estimating the missing music from the before and after regions, then animating the subtraction to reveal the clean beep.
svg.text: Recreating the Nostromo motion tracker sound
Pink is music. Green is the beep. The animation shows the estimated music being removed from the mixed sound.
